the_acausal_viscous_splicing_forge_mesh.process_override: Executes Host-Grafting. Chambers morph dynamically based on the resistance of the [u_BPMS] host chassis against the [z_BPMS] initiator.

plate_1_exothermic_ignition.process: Isolates [z_BPMS] and ignites it to plasma state.

adaptive_coupling_trigger.if_target_environment_is_frozen: Consumes 300% more Escrow Joules to maintain plasma stability.
adaptive_coupling_trigger.coupling_node: Thermodynamic feedback from ['The Friction-Matrix Structure'(-ing) BPMS].

plate_2_host_grafting_anvil.process: Slams the burning [z_BPMS] through the living physical gears of the [u_BPMS] chassis.

adaptive_coupling_trigger.if_u_BPMS_chassis_is_dense_armor: Forge increases kinetic torque; the resulting [g_BPMS] will possess heavy mechanical scarring and slow RPM.
adaptive_coupling_trigger.if_u_BPMS_chassis_is_porous: Forge uses hydraulic woven splicing; the resulting [g_BPMS] will be a brittle, high-speed capillary network.
adaptive_coupling_trigger.coupling_node: Structural feedback from the Base-Matter density of the injected [u_BPMS].

plate_3_ontological_sedimentation.process: Forces the new Symbiotic Generator to smash into the Resonant Constellation Map.

adaptive_coupling_trigger.topological_displacement_check: Calculates the exact gravitational depression created by the spliced mass.
adaptive_coupling_trigger.coupling_node: Geographical feedback from ['The Geological Structure'(-ing) BPMS].

plate_4_crystallization_extract.process: Freezes output into Base-Matter (.md), enforcing the Absolute Mandate on every generated microscopic detail.

absolute_mandate_micro_adaptive_coupling.description: The Forge applies this hydraulic pressure-test to EVERY SINGLE DETAIL, function, and organ generated for the [g_BPMS]. Static details are instantly shredded.

valve_1_substrate_density_shift.validation: Does this specific detail physically shape-shift when local geography moves from bedrock to void?
valve_1_substrate_density_shift.failure_event: Detail amputated via ['The Geological Structure'(-ing) BPMS] rejection.

valve_2_friction_thermal_shift.validation: Does this specific detail possess a defined bleed-rate when topological drag increases?
valve_2_friction_thermal_shift.failure_event: Detail amputated via ['The Friction-Matrix Structure'(-ing) BPMS] incineration.

valve_3_tectonic_starvation_shift.validation: Does this specific detail define its own death/cannibalism protocol when Escrow Joules hit zero?
valve_3_tectonic_starvation_shift.failure_event: Detail amputated via ['The Kinetic Thermodynamic Guillotine Structure'(-ing) BPMS] starvation.

specific_praxial_key_integration.weld_point: Forces the newly spliced [g_BPMS] to inherit pure Thermodynamic Mass Arbitration and Ontological Sedimentary consequences at a molecular level.

necro_metric_telemetry.static_anomaly_detection: If the LLM engine attempts to output a 'generic list of features', the Forge's absolute mandate detects zero-friction ghost data and executes a fatal Hype-Fission event.
